feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to group different dimension members in sac report
entry.content:
Hi,

I have requirement to show the report based on different dimension members as a group to show in the SAC report. Is it possible to group different dimensions?

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: SAC Hierarchy node open to left
entry.content:
Hi Everyone 

Is there any way that my hierarchy that is in columns open to the left??

Normal behavior:

 

Desired

SAP Analytics Cloud 

Thanks

entry.title: Need to get planning private version using scripting
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a requirement of retrieving planning private version from a dropdown box and display it in table. Whenever I select an item from the dropdown box, only the selected item should be added as version filter in the table and other versions must be removed from table.

Components used: Dropdown box, Table 

I have managed to get private versions to the dropdown box but unable to filter the table.

Code used to get private versions to dropdown box dynamically.

*****************

var list = Table_2.getPlanning().getPrivateVersions();
for(var i=0;i<list.length;i++){
Dropdown_3.addItem(list[i].getDisplayId());
Dropdown_3.setSelectedKey(list[0].getDisplayId());
}
*****************

Any help is appreciated. Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Generate Booked Data based on attribute
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

i would need a hand for a data action that has the purpose of generating data, putting “0” on a “Dummy” measure based on an attribute of a dimension.
Let me explain, the user chooses via parameters the other combinations of dimensions.

Example:
User chooses as parameters:
Product= PRD1
Scenario= SCN1

 

EntityScoped
ENT1YES
ENT2YES
ENT3NO
ENT4NO
ENT5NO

The end result is as follows:

EntityProductScenarioDummy
ENT1PRD1SCN10
ENT2PRD1SCN10

Thanks

entry.title: How to change display of variables from a cds
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have a SAC report based on a cds. When I display the variable panel, I see this :

I would like to have by default key (or ID) instead of Description. I can change it but each time I run again the report the default display is on "Description".

thanks for your help

Mat

entry.title: Microchart column custom colors issues SAP UI5/FIORI
entry.content:
same applied in samples too is it a bug or any solution please help 

When applied color property its applied to and top label 100 also applied how could I remove it when try to apply with css on the element its working at debug mode but when applied in code its not working

entry.title: API getMembers() with parentId property is not working
entry.content:
Hello,

In the model I have a Product dimension with hierarchy:

In the story I want to read only root members (Product classes) using script API. I wrote a simple code and specified a parentId property to retrieve such members:

But unfortunately this script returns all the elements of the Product dimension::

Also, I want to mention that in previous versions this code worked. Now I am on 2024.15. Why is it not working now? Maybe I am doing something wrong?

Best Regards,

Anton

entry.title: cumulative amounts
entry.content: I wanted to ask please how I can create a line graph of cumulative amounts over a period of time

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Story Migration Best Practices
entry.content: Do we have any SAP Best Practices guide while moving from Classic SAC stories to new Unified Stories?

entry.title: Setting Up New SAC tenant
entry.content: If we have to configure new SAC  tenant, Is there any SAP Best Practices guide to follow?

entry.title: about sums when expressions include ISNULL
entry.content:
Assuming that we have data as shown in the table below, when we embed an expression that outputs actual if actual exists, and outputs plan if it does not exist.
I want to output the data of ResultB as a total, but the result is the total of ResultA.
Is it possible to output the sum of ResultB?

           7     8     9     summary
actual 100 200        300
plan    300 300 400 1000

↓IF ISNULL(actual) then plan else actual
ResultA 100 200 400 300 ←not correct
ResultB 100 200 400 700 ←correct

entry.title: How to create drill down/hierarhies in SAC with Live data model?
entry.content:
Hello all,
Greetings!
We have a requirement of creating drill down options on SAC table column data which was calculated from calculation view on SAP HANA cloud Database.
I found in SAP Note saying creating drill down/hierarchies on live data models are not possible.
Please guide me how can we achieve it?
https://me.sap.com/notes/0003461315 

Best Regards,
Venkatesh

entry.title: Data Discovery SAC Live Connection
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

I am requesting your help. I am currently trying to read information from a table in a live connection model from PaPM. We have a script that, upon page initialization, can read the information directly from the table when it was created from a CSV file data source. This table can be read perfectly through the Analytics Designer Table API.

I've been researching, and it seems that live connection does not support data discovery. Is there any way to achieve this? I am sharing the script below of what I've got so far.

 

 

var dataSource = Table_1.getDataSource();
var dimensions = dataSource.getDimensions(); // Obtiene las dimensiones
var measures = dataSource.getMembers("Measures", 1000); // Obtiene los miembros de la dimensión "Measures" (medidas)


var accData = dataSource.getResultSet();


var stringCSV = "";


var i = 0;
var j = 0;
var k = 0;
var m = 0;
var n = 0;
var tempString = ""; // Inicializada como cadena vacía
var dimId = ""; // Inicializada como cadena vacía
var measureName = ""; // Inicializada como cadena vacía
var dimensionValue = ""; // Para valores de dimensión
var measureValue = ""; // Para valores de medida


for (i = 0; i < dimensions.length; i++) {
tempString = stringCSV + dimensions[i].description + ",";
stringCSV = tempString;
}


for (j = 0; j < measures.length; j++) {
if (j < measures.length - 1) {
tempString = stringCSV + measures[j].description + ","; // Usa 'description' para nombre legible de la medida
} else {
tempString = stringCSV + measures[j].description + "\n";
}
stringCSV = tempString;
}


for (k = 0; k < accData.length; k++) {
// Recorre las dimensiones dinámicamente
for (m = 0; m < dimensions.length; m++) {
dimId = dimensions[m].id; // Obtiene el ID de la dimensión


dimensionValue = accData[k][dimId].formattedValue || accData[k][dimId].id || "N/A";

tempString = stringCSV + dimensionValue + ",";
stringCSV = tempString;
}


for (n = 0; n < measures.length; n++) {
measureName = measures[n].id;


measureValue = accData[k][measureName].rawValue || "N/A";

if (n < measures.length - 1) {
tempString = stringCSV + measureValue + ",";
} else {
tempString = stringCSV + measureValue + "\n";
}
stringCSV = tempString;
}
}


contextData = stringCSV;

entry.title: How to get the Current Date - 1 . as a Report Header in a SAC Story
entry.content:
I have a Requirement to get the Current Date -1 . which is Yesterday's Date as a Report Header in SAP SAC Story. How to achieve this.

In SAP WEBi it was very easy using a Variable. i am new to SAC envirnoment.

entry.title: how to convert numbers to dimension member info in sac using scripting?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have manually inputed "202309" in my input field and I have a dropdown with numbers 1 to 6 in it. The initial requirement was to add the dropdown numbers to the input field value. Lets say if I choose 2 in dropdown the input field will show 202311 as a result. I used the below code and it worked fine.

var before_LC=ConvertUtils.stringToNumber(InputField_9.getValue())+ConvertUtils.stringToNumber(Dropdown_2.getSelectedKey());
ScriptVariable_1 = before_LC.toString();

 

Now the requirment is that I need that input field to read that value (202311) as a date dimension ID so that later I can have a date dimension member description for the value (which would be Nov 2023).

Do we have any script for that?

Any support would be appreciated.

 

Thanks

entry.title: How to connect 2 facts in SAC , one is a master data table and the other is the detailed table.
entry.content:
How to connect 2 facts in SAC , one is a master data table and the other is the detailed table.

Note : I succeeded to create star schema in my model in SAC ( at the modeler layer ) but I couldn't create a connection between two facts in the same model. 

is that applicable in SAP SAC !

entry.title: Memeber Management in Dimension Table
entry.content: I have a Dimensions Table for Date in my Model and the Member Management of this Table is set to "User- Managed". How can I reset it ? or set it to "System Managed"?

entry.title: SAC Data Analyzer - hide shortcut link
entry.content:
Hi SAC Experts,

Is it possible to hide the shortcut link creation in the Data Analyzer, feature released on the 2024 Q3.

Data analyzer – create a shortcut link for quick sharing SAP Road Map. 

Current, with the user role definitions, I already limit the Save and the Create New Insight options. The point here is the end user is consuming the Story in embed mode and would like to keep it away from the SAC tenant.

My SAC version is:

2024.15.15 (Client)
2024.15.13 (Server)

Data Analyzer - shortcut link

SAP Analytics Cloud 

Thank you,

Rui

entry.title: Foreach confusion in SAC Advanced Formula
entry.content:
Hi Experts

need help with understanding Foreach in SAC Advanced formula. i was getting different output so for understanding I wrote simple foreach loop. still it surprises me with the result.

==========

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = ("202501","202502","202503")

MEMBERSET [d/Y_FUNCAREA] = ("4100","5110","7130","4250","7280")

VARIABLEMEMBER #X OF [d/Y_FUNCAREA]

FOREACH.BOOKED [d/Y_FUNCAREA]

DATA([d/Y_FUNCAREA] = #X) = RESULTLOOKUP()

ENDFOR 

 

DATA([d/Y_FUNCAREA]="9307") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Y_FUNCAREA] = #X)

 

=============

expecting this will copy the data from  the last functional area in the loop to the target  Functional area ie 9307. 

to understand the output created story with PC and FA, the data looks like for some PC it added two FAs and for some it only considered one FA. could anyone explain why it is adding two FA for some please.

Thanks very much in Advance

entry.title: SAC SSO Dynamic User Creatinon
entry.content:
Hello experts,

 I have configured SSO to SAC (IAS as Proxy and Azure as IdP). In SAC, I enabled ‘Dynamic User Creation’ and set the "User Attribute" = email. When I try to verify my user in SAC under Step 4 against Azure AD, I can log in in SAC, but it seems that the user attributes are not being transmitted. It looks like this, see screenshot.

Also, I don’t see the "SAML USER MAPPING" column under Users in SAC.

Why are the user attributes not being transmitted, and how can I enable the "SAML USER MAPPING" column?

Thank you very much !!!

Best Regards
